column1: # xlsx-imported sheet visibility states preserve through load/save and
# Ctrl-PgUp/PgDn navigation skips Hidden / VeryHidden sheets.
# Pointer lands on the first visible sheet (A) at A1.
# Ctrl-PgDn advances to the next *visible* sheet — skipping the
# Hidden B and the VeryHidden C, landing on D.
# Pressing Ctrl-PgDn at the last visible sheet is a no-op.
# Ctrl-PgUp returns directly to A — again skipping C and B.
# Pressing Ctrl-PgUp at the first visible sheet is a no-op.
